7315.title: Written In Blood
7315.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

7316.title: Judge Judy
7316.description: A woman fights with her ex-boyfriend over an oven.

7317.title: Cheaters
7317.description: Tony's suspicions are aroused when wife Becky misses their first wedding anniversary. David is worried about the lack of intimacy between him and wife Kim.

7318.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7318.description: A look at the life of the notorious murderer, who broke into a home and took the lives of three family members in a senseless killing.

7319.title: Judge Judy
7319.description: Neighbours accuse each other of child abuse and harassment. Then, a woman says her sister stole her TV while she was in jail.

7320.title: Judge Judy
7320.description: A disabled veteran, who says that a pit bull attacked his service dog, sues the owner for damages.

7321.title: Judge Judy
7321.description: A landlord says the police raided his property because of a tenant's teen parties. Then, a woman sues her ex and his mother for medical bills.

7322.title: Something's Killing Me
7322.description: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they - what causes them? And are they real?

7323.title: Operation Repo
7323.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7324.title: Operation Repo
7324.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7325.title: Judge Judy
7325.description: Glasses are broken during a drinking game. Then, a mother of two toddlers sues a caretaker for the return of pre-paid baby-sitting fees.

7326.title: Judge Judy
7326.description: Ex-friends argue over rent and utilities. Then, a former couple fight over accusations of assault and the return of a laptop.

7327.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7327.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

7328.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7328.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.

7329.title: Close Calls On Camera
7329.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

7330.title: Operation Repo
7330.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7331.title: Operation Repo
7331.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7332.title: Haunted Case Files
7332.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.

7333.title: Judge Judy
7333.description: A plaintiff says her son's fiancee destroyed her belongings and failed to pay rent. A woman wants her child's father to repay her for an amusement park pass. A defendant says he had no choice but to kick down his sister's door.

7334.title: Judge Judy
7334.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

7335.title: Judge Judy
7335.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

7336.title: Operation Repo
7336.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7337.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7337.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

7338.title: The Day I Should Have Died
7338.description: Declan Brady was on a flight from London to Belfast when the engine failed and the aircraft crashed. He managed to escape and get himself to safety.

7339.title: Close Calls On Camera
7339.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the story of a professional British cyclist involved in a horrific collision with a race support vehicle. Plus, a driver's dash cam records the moment a car pulls out in front of him leaving him with nowhere to go, and two men using an accelerant to start a bonfire get more than they bargained for.

7340.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7340.description: The Chapmans have their work cut out for them when longtime friend Glenn Strickland asks the team to come to Houston and train his new, recently-married bounty hunters.

7341.title: Judge Judy
7341.description: A pregnant teen is sued for medical bills and property damage after she assaults another teen; a man sues former residents for leaving his duplex a mess.

7342.title: Judge Judy
7342.description: Men fight over damages after one punches the other; a former friend sues a teen for repayment of a loan.

7343.title: Haunted Case Files
7343.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.
